title: M.Com Jobs 2026 – Assistant Professor
shortInfo: Central University of Rajasthan (CURAJ) Recruitment 2026 for 3 posts of Assistant Professor. Candidates with Ph.D, Master Degree Can attend walkin. The Walkin Interview Starts on 29-05-2026 to 05-06-2026. For detailed information please visit CURAJ official website.

basic_details.short_information: Central University of Rajasthan (CURAJ) Recruitment 2026 for 3 posts of Assistant Professor. Candidates with Ph.D, Master Degree Can attend walkin. The Walkin Interview Starts on 29-05-2026 to 05-06-2026. For detailed information please visit CURAJ official website.

application_fee.details: All Posts: No minimum or maximum age limit is specified. Age relaxation is applicable as per University/GOI rules for SC/ST/OBC/Physically challenged candidates.

age_limit.maximum_age: As per University/GOI rules for SC/ST/OBC/Physically challenged candidates
age_limit.age_details: As per University/GOI rules for SC/ST/OBC/Physically challenged candidates
age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CURAJ Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree with NET/Ph.D. exemption as per UGC Regulations 2018, Minimum 55% or 60% marks as specified per post, Professional experience where required
qualification.details: Assistant Professor - Management: Bachelor's Degree in any discipline and Master's Degree in Business Administration/PGDM/C.A./ICWA/M.Com. with First Class or equivalent at master level and two years of professional experience after acquiring the degree of Master's degree. Minimum 60% marks in at least two preceding examinations before Master degree. Qualified UGC-National Eligibility Test (NET) in Management/relevant discipline. Candidates who have been awarded a Ph.D. Degree in accordance with the provisions contained in the Para 4.1(l)(A)(ii), UGC Regulations, 2018 are exempted from the requirement of the minimum eligibility condition of NET. Minimum two years of professional experience after acquiring the degree of Master's degree. Area of Specialization: Financial Management/Marketing Management/General Management. Assistant Professor - English: Master Degree in English from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign University. At least 55% marks in Master degree and at least 60% marks in at least two preceding examinations. Qualified UGC-National Eligibility Test (NET) in English. Candidates who have been awarded a Ph.D. Degree in accordance with the provisions contained in the Para 4.1(I)(A)(ii), UGC Regulations, 2018 are exempted from the requirement of the minimum eligibility condition of NET. Assistant Professor - Commerce: Master Degree in Commerce from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign University. At least 55% marks in Master degree and at least 60% marks in at least two preceding examinations. Qualified UGC-National Eligibility Test (NET) in Commerce. Candidates who have been awarded a Ph.D. Degree in accordance with the provisions contained in the Para 4.1(I)(A)(ii), UGC Regulations, 2018 are exempted from the requirement of the minimum eligibility condition of NET. Area of Specialization: Accounting, Finance, General Management, Taxation.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for CURAJ Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on the specified dates for each post. There is no separate last date for application submission.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Professor posts will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000/- per month.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree with NET/Ph.D. exemption as per UGC Regulations 2018. Specific marks and additional qualifications vary by specialization, as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for CURAJ Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Assistant Professor positions in different specializations.

faq.question: What is the selection process for CURAJ Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these contractual positions will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Where will the Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at the Central University of Rajasthan (CURAJ). Specific venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Are there any age limit relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/Physically challenged candidates as per University/GOI rules.

faq.question: What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: What is the job type for these Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Assistant Professor positions is Contractual.

seo_tags: Central University of Rajasthan Assistant Professor - Management
